Title: Duke of Ferrara

Lucrezia Borgia
daughter of Pope Alexander VI

CHARLESORLEANS.label:
Charles, Duke of Orleans
celebrated poet; captured
at Agincourt, held 25 years

Francis II
last independent
Title: Duke of Brittany

Lorenzo de' Medici
Machiavelli dedicated 'The Prince'
to him
Title: Duke of Urbino

PIEROUNFORTUNATE.label:

driven out of Florence, 1494

Lorenzo the Magnificent
the great patron of the

POPELEOX.label:
✝ Pope Leo X
Medici son; excommunicated

PIEROGOUTY.label:
Piero the Gouty
Title: ruler of Florence

GIULIANOMEDICI.label:
Giuliano de' Medici
murdered in the Pazzi

POPECLEMENTVII.label:
✝ Pope Clement VII
refused Henry VIII's annulment -
triggering the English Reformation

COSIMOELDER.label:
Cosimo the Elder
founded Medici political power;

GIOVANNIBICCI.label:
